emails.subject: Sempra
emails.body: Guys, There are a couple of analyst reports on Sempra in the directory: O/Portland/Origlist/AnalystReports Some fluff, some generic background, some insight. One concern that jumps out is the analyst's comments about trading and risk management being a Sempra strength. Lets talk thim morning Chris
